# Minerva Tanglao Ott (Minnie) - Portfolio & LLM Map

> Minerva Tanglao Ott is a Silicon Valley engineering leader, Head of Technology, and Technical Program Management (TPM) Specialist. She specializes in bridging engineering operations and Agentic AI transformations.

## Core Background & Lineage
- **Stanford LEAD** Executive Education Program Graduate (Stanford Graduate School of Business).
- **BS Computer Science** from Ateneo de Manila University.
- **Google**: Spearheaded Maps voice navigation features integrated with Gemini AI.
- **Apple**: Managed global IS&T corporate and HR portal software deployments.
- **Sun Microsystems / Oracle**: Directed Java Management Extensions (JMX) program architectures and was the Technical Editor of the book *JMX Programming*.

---

## Navigation & Dynamic Routes
- [/](https://ais-pre-mqznufwafvpvxtzyrnuxum-278675378343.us-east1.run.app/) - Personal profile page with professional summary, career timeline, patents, speaking events, and recommendations.
- [/work](https://ais-pre-mqznufwafvpvxtzyrnuxum-278675378343.us-east1.run.app/work) - Portfolio of deployed software platforms, engineering projects, and detailed timeline of experiences at Google, Apple, and Creative Blue.
- [/contact](https://ais-pre-mqznufwafvpvxtzyrnuxum-278675378343.us-east1.run.app/contact) - Connection, collaboration, booking, and email intake form.
- [/blog](https://ais-pre-mqznufwafvpvxtzyrnuxum-278675378343.us-east1.run.app/blog) - Technology insights and publications authored by Minnie.
- [/blog/author](https://ais-pre-mqznufwafvpvxtzyrnuxum-278675378343.us-east1.run.app/blog/author) - Author panel for managing, drafting, editing, and publishing blog articles.

---

## Deployed Software & AI Solutions

### 1. Creative Blue GrowthOS
- **Status**: Ready to use
- **Type**: Flagship Platform
- **Focus**: Strategic AI-driven operations platform for agencies.
- **Tech Stack**: Generative AI, Agentic Workflows, React, TypeScript.

### 2. Lead Generator
- **Status**: Ready to use
- **Focus**: AI agents and sales intelligence to streamline lead prospecting.
- **Tech Stack**: AI Agents, Google Cloud Platform, Lead Qualification.

### 3. Brand Assessment
- **Status**: Ready to use
- **Focus**: NLP-driven sentiment analysis dashboard for enterprise brand monitoring.
- **Tech Stack**: NLP, Brand Intelligence, Sentiment Analysis, Executive Dashboard.

### 4. Regnum Dei
- **Status**: Ready to use
- **Focus**: Digital platform for community building, high-fidelity design standards, and engagement.
- **Tech Stack**: Web Design, Digital Platform, Responsive Design, CSS Grid.

### 5. Grex World
- **Status**: Work In Progress
- **Focus**: A conceptual AI-matching and health partnership framework designed to incubate individual gig-economy contributions into investable ventures.
- **Tech Stack**: Gig Economy, AI Market Matching, Health Partnerships, Investments.

### 6. Just Ride
- **Status**: Work In Progress
- **Focus**: High-speed sports telemetry ingestion pipeline and race analytics platform.
- **Tech Stack**: Sports Analytics, Telemetry Processing, Data Pipeline, Race Intelligence.

---

## Academic Credentials, Books & Patents
- **US Patent 20020064766**: Method and Apparatus for Managing Enterprise Employee Training Systems (auditing and automatic provisioning of organizational learning assets).
- **Book (Technical Editor)**: *JMX Programming* by Mike Jasnowski.
- **Vanderbilt University Certificate**: AI Agent Development & LLM Fluency (Model Context Protocol).
- **Google Cloud AI Certificate**: Professional & Essentials specializations.
- **PRINCE2 Certification**: Project Management Foundation.

---

## AI Agent Integration (Mochi AI Chatbot)
The website features an interactive AI chatbot companion named **Mochi Pancake**, inspired by Minnie's Samoyed dog. Mochi is fully capable of answering questions about Minnie's career, architecture, and technology insights.
